stemHtml: The commands sent out by the yaw damper computer…

options.a: are inhibited when the autopilot is engaged.
options.b: are added to or subtracted from the rudder deflection orders sent out by the pilot or the autopilot.
options.c: are inhibited when the pilot acts on the rudder pedals.
options.d: inhibit the rudder deflection orders sent out by the pilot or the autopilot.
